title: One Exciting Week
writer: Dennis Murray, Jack Townley, John K. Butler
actors: Al Pearce, Pinky Lee, Jerome Cowan
plot: A returning WWII hero is on his way to his home town where he is to receive a medal and $10,000. Before arriving he is stricken with amnesia and falls in with a gang of crooks. They do not realize he is the actual Dan Flannery, an...
